entry.data:
CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 50
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT
